scripts.dev: node -e "console.log('extension: run yarn workspace @saintrocky/extension build:dev and load apps/extension/dist as unpacked')"
scripts.build: node ./scripts/sync-design-tokens.mjs && vite build && EXTENSION_BUILD_ENV=production node ./scripts/build-content-script.mjs && node ./scripts/write-manifest.mjs
scripts.build:dev: node ./scripts/sync-design-tokens.mjs && vite build --mode development && EXTENSION_BUILD_ENV=development node ./scripts/build-content-script.mjs && node ./scripts/write-manifest.mjs
